meaning: n.炮铜(铜锡合金),青铜,炮铜色
examples: The village slept in the gunmetal of its evening.
The sky is flat gunmetal grey. The sun shines brightly.
It has a soft brushed finish, and is a gunmetal blue color.
The Vengeance M65 is available in three colors Military Green, Arctic White and Gunmetal Black.
The ensemble came complete with a gunmetal crystal necklace and green velvet metal-heel pumps.
